programs.title: Stan Can
programs.desc: Stan is called to fix Myrtle's sofa while she watches her favourite dance show with Hettie and Hattie.

programs.title: Nikhil & Jay
programs.sub_title: Nikhil and Jay and the Monsooooooon!
programs.desc: After their grandparents in India have a monsoon, Nikhil and Jay want one at home.

programs.title: Nature Explorers With Elmo, Gabrielle And Tango
programs.desc: When Grandma Nell doesn't have a book about leaves to help Gabrielle and Elmo identify some leaves drawn in Gabrielle's notebook, Gabrielle wonders if she and Elmo can make their own book to add to Grandma Nell's collection.

programs.title: Mittens & Pants
programs.desc: When Blueberry the tortoise buys the amazing cat toy Mittens finds at the swap meet, Mittens does whatever she can to trade for it.

programs.title: BeddyByes
programs.desc: MeMo and BaBa go on the hunt for an intriguing sound.

programs.title: Mixmups
programs.desc: The Mixmups take a trip to space for a cheesy bite to eat. As the orders pile up Lucky Loover Bird chef, will they have the patience to wait for their food?
